zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Eyncourt於大約1072年出生在英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼時，他的父親Walter Gautier de Eyncourt32歲，母親Matilda de Bretagne14歲。他於1115年與Basilie of Nottinghamshire在英國結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1140年在他的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Eyncourt于大约1072年出生在英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼时，他的父亲Walter Gautier de Eyncourt32岁，母亲Matilda de Bretagne14岁。他于1115年与Basilie of Nottinghamshire在英国结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1140年在他的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Eyncourt was born about 1072, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Walter Gautier de Eyncourt, was 32 and his mother, Matilda de Bretagne, was 14. He married Basilie of Nottinghamshire in 1115, in England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. He died about 1140, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph d’Eyncourt est né environ 1072, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Gautier d’Eyncourt, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Bretagne, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Basilie of Nottinghamshire en 1115, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé environ 1140, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Eyncourt um 1072 in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Gautier de Eyncourt 32 und seine Mutter Matilda de Bretagne 14. Er hat 1115 in England Basilie of Nottinghamshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb um 1140 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Eyncourt è nato il circa 1072 nel Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Walter Gautier de Eyncourt, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Matilda de Bretagne, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Basilie of Nottinghamshire nel 1115, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie. Morì circa 1140, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Eyncourtが約1072年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーで生まれた時，父Walter Gautier de Eyncourtは32歳，母Matilda de Bretagneは14歳であった。1115年にイギリスでBasilie of Nottinghamshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は約1140年に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Eyncourt(이)가 대략 1072년 영국 링코실르 블랭니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Gautier de Eyncourt(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Bretagne(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1115년 영국에서 Basilie of Nottinghamshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1140년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Eyncourt nasceu aproximadamente 1072, em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Gautier de Eyncourt, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Bretagne, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Basilie of Nottinghamshire em 1115, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1140, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Eyncourt родился около 1072 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Gautier de Eyncourt было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Bretagne, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Basilie of Nottinghamshire в 1115 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер около 1140 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.

sm.about 1072–about 1140: e tusa o le 1072–e tusa o le 1140

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Eyncourt nació aproximadamente 1072, en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Gautier de Eyncourt, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Matilda de Bretagne, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Basilie of Nottinghamshire en 1115, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1140, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años.
